digest_markdown:
## URGENT – Action required this month
Nothing urgent this month.

## MONTHLY DIGEST – what changed?
No new regulatory changes in the past 30 days.

## STRATEGIC INSIGHTS
1. The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) remains a critical compliance area for TechStartup GmbH, as it applies to any organization that processes personal data of EU residents, regardless of the company's location. It's important to continuously monitor GDPR developments and ensure your data processing activities are aligned with the regulation.

2. The proposed AI Act, once finalized and implemented, will establish a comprehensive framework for the development and use of artificial intelligence systems in the EU. As a fintech company, TechStartup GmbH should closely follow the progress of the AI Act and assess how it may impact your products and services.

3. The Payment Services Directive 2 (PSD2) continues to be relevant for TechStartup GmbH as a fintech company, as it aims to promote innovation and competition in the payment services market. While there are no recent updates, it's important to stay informed about any future changes to PSD2 that may affect your business.

## UPCOMING DEADLINES

plain_summaries.title: This month's key changes

3. Since there are no new changes, your company can continue operating under the existing regulatory framework without needing to take any immediate action.
